{{Shell
|name={{PAGENAME}}
|image={{PAGENAME}}.png
|description=The Traveler known as the Demonlord of the 6th Heaven once visited various high monks in a quest for the true meaning of life. It immediately made Snail Shell after the journey was over and indicated that only the eternal fire within oneself is the sole truth!
|affct=ART
|hard=RUSH
|source=
{{Memetic Catalyst
|number=1261
|relic1=Mother and Daughter
|relic2=Theogony
|relic3=Seated Voltaire
|relic4=Ansidei Madonna
|relic5=Annunciation
}}
|color=purple
|earth=7
|water=6
|fire=6
|wind=7
|form=Demon
|element=Earth
|realm=Rift
|orangehard=RUSH
}}
